sql_array: CREATE TABLE services (id INT PRIMARY KEY, service_name VARCHAR(100), creation_date DATE, version FLOAT);
SELECT uddi_find_service(service_name) FROM services WHERE creation_date BETWEEN '2023-01-01' AND '2023-12-31';
SELECT * FROM services WHERE id BETWEEN (SELECT MIN(id) FROM services) AND (SELECT MAX(id) FROM services);
SELECT service_name, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY version) AS version_count FROM services WHERE udid_find_service(service_name) IS NOT NULL AND version BETWEEN 1.0 AND 3.5;
SELECT service_name FROM services WHERE creation_date IS NULL OR (creation_date BETWEEN '2023-01-01' AND '2023-12-31');
SELECT service_name FROM services WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM services) BETWEEN 1 AND 5 HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
INSERT INTO services VALUES (4, 'Service D', NULL, 4.0);
SELECT * FROM services WHERE uddi_find_service(service_name) IS NOT NULL AND service_name BETWEEN '' AND 'Service Z';

SELECT service_name FROM services JOIN (SELECT MAX(version) AS max_version FROM services) AS max_versions ON services.version = max_versions.max_version WHERE uddi_find_service(service_name) IS NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE services ADD COLUMN active BOOLEAN;
UPDATE services SET active = TRUE WHERE id BETWEEN 1 AND 3;
SELECT uddi_find_service(service_name) FROM services WHERE active IS NOT NULL AND (version BETWEEN 1.0 AND (SELECT MAX(version) FROM services));
